headline: Hospital Bed Occupancy Rate Exceeds 90% at 28 Government Hospitals
context: Overcrowding at public hospitals persists with 28 facilities operating above safe occupancy levels throughout 2025.

cards.big: 28 government hospitals operated above 90% bed occupancy throughout 2025
cards.sub: International safety standard recommends maximum 85% occupancy for infection control

cards.big: Patient corridor admissions reported at 12 hospitals due to bed unavailability
cards.sub: Corridor patients receive reduced monitoring and higher infection exposure

cards.big: Malaysia has 1.9 hospital beds per 1,000 population versus OECD average of 4.3
cards.sub: Bed shortfall of approximately 45,000 beds drives chronic overcrowding

cards.big: Vietnam expanded hospital capacity 35% through public-private partnership bed-sharing agreements
cards.sub: Contracted private hospital beds absorbed overflow during peak demand periods

cards.big: Hospitals operating at unsafe occupancy levels put every patient at risk not just those on corridors
Should Malaysia build 20 new hospitals by 2030 to bring bed ratio to international standards
